data.content: Trim the duplicated Claude provider prefix from the active-view model column so claude-opus-4-6 renders as Agent: Claude | Model: Opus, and add a regression test for active agent info formatting. Validated with bun run lint, bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, and bun run build. Work branch commit 4c46261d2abe was integrated on main as e4bde357130c and pushed to origin/main.
